task_description: Build a full-stack WhatsApp Gateway SaaS website with login/register, WhatsApp number verification via pairing code (using baileys + baileys-antiban), 3-tier subscription system (free/pro/enterprise), professional UI with landing page, and REST API for message sending.

verification.summary: Full build passes (server TypeScript + client Vite). All 9 tests pass (7 server auth tests + 2 client tests). Semantic review approved after 3 iterations fixing security, data integrity, and consistency issues.
